subject: [SDNC] Enable SDNC Sanity test
commit_message:
[SDNC] Enable SDNC Sanity test

Enable SDNC Sanity test of GR API

Issue-ID: TEST-395
Signed-off-by: Lukasz Rajewski <lukasz.rajewski@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: I18454a2ca66005693c8db193bd6b429a1ae2ce6f

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/228/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/228/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/228/ )
